Related Entities

  • hospital NORTHWEST HEALTH - PORTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital PORTER-STARKE SERVICES INC
  • snf BRICKYARD HEALTHCARE - VALPARAISO CARE CENTER 4-star, 85 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF THE WILLOWS 1-star, 92 beds
  • snf VALPARAISO CARE & REHABILITATION 1-star, 164 beds
  • snf BRICKYARD HEALTHCARE - PORTAGE CARE CENTER 3-star, 186 beds
  • snf CHESTERTON MANOR 1-star, 100 beds
  • snf MILLER'S MERRY MANOR 2-star, 66 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF VALPARAISO 5-star, 110 beds
  • snf AVALON SPRINGS HEALTH CAMPUS 4-star, 61 beds

  • snf IGNITE MEDICAL RESORT CHESTERTON 1-star, 70 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
